name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x: 56 creature sprites, 13 script events (encounter/battle/party/capture/heal/items/dex/trainer), 14 backgrounds incl 4 trainer portraits + battle arena + game-over (Pokemon-RBY style), overworld tileset, 5 sound FX, starter trio (KERNITE/RECURSE/BYTEFLY), 5-type chart. Drop in plugins/ and reload.
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
